claims.claimText: AC Joint Separation pathoanatomy centers on ac-joint, clavicle and related stabilizers.

metadata.claim_text: AC Joint Separation pathoanatomy centers on ac-joint, clavicle and related stabilizers.

claims.claimText: Students often underweight exam findings and over-rely on imaging when evaluating ac joint separation.

metadata.claim_text: Students often underweight exam findings and over-rely on imaging when evaluating ac joint separation.

claims.claimText: State mechanism, key exam findings, imaging role, treatment concept, and return-to-play framework for ac joint separation.

metadata.claim_text: State mechanism, key exam findings, imaging role, treatment concept, and return-to-play framework for ac joint separation.

claims.claimText: Do not anchor on a single exam maneuver for ac joint separation — integrate mechanism, instability symptoms, and imaging pattern.

metadata.claim_text: Do not anchor on a single exam maneuver for ac joint separation — integrate mechanism, instability symptoms, and imaging pattern.

claims.claimText: AC separations are graded shoulder girdle injuries where displacement and patient demand guide operative versus nonoperative care.

metadata.claim_text: AC separations are graded shoulder girdle injuries where displacement and patient demand guide operative versus nonoperative care.

claims.claimText: Rehabilitation milestones and return-to-play criteria for ac joint separation require attending-defined progression gates.

decisionPoints.trigger: Active athlete with functional instability or mechanical symptoms from ac joint separation despite appropriate initial management
decisionPoints.action: Discuss operative reconstruction versus continued rehabilitation; graft selection and fixation are attending decisions

decisionPoints.trigger: Athlete approaching return-to-sport after ac joint separation treatment
decisionPoints.action: Apply sport-specific return-to-play criteria with strength, stability, and functional testing milestones
